title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot: a cross-platform agent assistant framework
friendlyTitle: AstrBot connects one AI assistant to many chat apps
summary: AstrBot is a Python-based agent assistant and development framework with about 37,000 GitHub stars. It connects multiple language models, plugins, and messaging platforms, with an active contributor base and frequent releases.
friendlySummary: AstrBot is a popular open-source system for AI assistants. It supports many models, messaging apps, and plugins.
whyItMatters: Builders can use it to run one extensible assistant across chat services instead of maintaining a separate integration for each platform. Its plugin and model abstractions also make it useful for studying how a mature open-source agent gateway handles providers, tools, and messaging.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can build one assistant for several chat services or learn how a large agent framework is organised.
